title: Motif-Based Failure/Ambiguity Prediction: Classifying Attribution Graphs by Correctness Status via 3-Node Motif Features
summary: Demo notebook that classifies Neuronpedia attribution graphs as verified-correct vs ambiguous using 3-node motif spectrum features. Loads 100 pre-computed graphs (76 true, 24 unknown across 8 domains) from GitHub, builds a 18-feature matrix (motif ratios, z-scores, graph stats, within-domain deviations), and trains Logistic Regression and Random Forest classifiers with repeated stratified cross-validation. Includes ablation study, per-domain analysis, permutation significance testing (p<0.001), bootstrap confidence intervals, and a multi-panel visualization. Best model (RF_all) achieves AUC ~0.84.
